composition.Programmer 1:
Fix and enhance the backend code in main.py to ensure all routes correctly render the corresponding HTML templates from the 'templates' directory, handle data reading/writing properly, and prevent unnecessary redirects by verifying data existence. Key tasks include 
- Verify and fix template rendering paths to match the actual 'templates' folder structure.
- Ensure all data files in 'data/' directory are correctly read and contain the required example data to avoid missing resource redirects.
- Improve error handling and flash messaging for missing data scenarios.
- Maintain all functionalities  browsing movies, viewing showtimes, selecting seats, booking tickets, viewing booking history, and managing theater information.
- Keep the first page accessible at route '/' (Dashboard page).
- Coordinate with Programmer 2 to ensure backend routes match frontend template names and dynamic content placeholders.
composition.Programmer 2:
Complete and fix all eight HTML template files in the 'templates/' directory to match the page designs specified in the original task, ensuring 
- All required templates (dashboard.html, movie_catalog.html, movie_details.html, showtime_selection.html, seat_selection.html, booking_confirmation.html, booking_history.html, theater_information.html) are present and correctly named.
- UI elements have the specified IDs and element types as per the original task.
- Dynamic content placeholders are properly integrated to be populated by backend data.
- All URLs in the frontend code correspond to backend routes, not direct HTML file names.
- Collaborate with Programmer 1 to align template placeholders with backend data structures and route parameters.
